connectorUiConfig.title: Cloudflare Audit Logs (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
The [Cloudflare](https://www.cloudflare.com/) Audit Logs connector provides the capability to ingest Cloudflare [account audit logs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/account/account-security/audit-logs/) into Microsoft Sentinel using the Cloudflare Audit Logs v2 API.

Audit logs capture actions taken against your Cloudflare account, including user logins, setting changes, and more.

**Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:**

This solution takes a dependency on the following technologies, and some of these dependencies either may be in Preview state or might result in additional ingestion or operational costs:

a. [Codeless Connector Framework (CCF)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/sentinel/create-custom-connector)

sampleQueries.description: Get Sample Cloudflare Audit Log Events
Cloudflare Audit Log Events by Actor

dataTypes.name: {{graphQueriesTableName}}

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Cloudflare Account API token
customs.description: A Cloudflare Account API token with **Account & Billing > Account Settings > Read** permission is required. Refer to the [Cloudflare documentation](https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/api/get-started/account-owned-tokens/) for instructions on creating an API token.

customs.name: Cloudflare Account ID
customs.description: Your Cloudflare Account ID is available in the Cloudflare dashboard URL or under **Account Home > Overview**. Refer to the [Cloudflare documentation](https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/setup/find-account-and-zone-ids/) for instructions.

instructionSteps.title: Connect Cloudflare Audit Logs to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description:
To enable ingestion of Cloudflare account audit logs, provide your Cloudflare Account ID and Cloudflare Account API token below, then click Connect.

> **Note:** Ensure your API token has the **Account & Billing > Account Settings > Read** permission scope.

parameters.label: Cloudflare Account API token
parameters.placeholder: Enter your Cloudflare Account API token
parameters.name: apikey
